## Binder.on() method

Reads the specified value and applies it to the target via a custom callback. If the value is a store, a binding will be added. If the target was nameless, an id will be assigned to it.

**Signature:**

```typescript
on<T extends TTarget, V>(target: T, value: AnyBindable<V> | undefined, callback: (target: T, value: V) => void): void;
```
